zh.Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可
zh.Henrico, Colony of Virginia, British Col: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cox於大約1664年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可時，他的父親John Cox45歲，母親Rebecca Craddock36歲。他於1691年6月16日與Sarah Dennis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1712年6月之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可
zh-hans.Henrico, Colony of Virginia, British Col: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Cox于大约1664年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可时，他的父亲John Cox45岁，母亲Rebecca Craddock36岁。他于1691年6月16日与Sarah Dennis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1712年6月之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Cox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Cocke and Cook , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Ulster): mistranslation of Mac Con Coille (‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’), as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.
Dutch and Flemish: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Cock, a vernacular short form of Cornelius .

variants.name: Cocke
meanings: nickname from Middle English cok (Old English and Old French coc) ‘rooster’.
patronymic from the Old French and Middle English personal name Cok, of uncertain origin but perhaps derived from the word in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Cox was born about 1664, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, John Cox, was 45 and his mother, Rebecca Craddock, was 36. He married Sarah Dennis on 16 June 1691, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died before June 1712, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Cox est né environ 1664, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Cox, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Craddock, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Dennis le 16 juin 1691, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé avant juin 1712, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Cox um 1664 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cox 45 und seine Mutter Rebecca Craddock 36. Er hat am 16. Juni 1691 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America Sarah Dennis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb vor Juni 1712 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Cox è nato il circa 1664 nel Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, John Cox, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Rebecca Craddock, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Dennis il 16 giugno 1691, nel Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì prima del giugno 1712, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコ
ja.Henrico, Colony of Virginia, British Col: イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコ
ja.lifeSummary: William Coxが約1664年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコで生まれた時，父John Coxは45歳，母Rebecca Craddockは36歳であった。1691年6月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコでSarah Dennisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1712年6月以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코
ko.Henrico, Colony of Virginia, British Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코
ko.lifeSummary: William Cox(이)가 대략 1664년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cox(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebecca Craddock(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1691년 6월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Sarah Dennis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1712년 6월 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1664–before June 1712: ойролцоогоор 1664 он–1712 оны Зургаадугаар сараас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Cox nasceu aproximadamente 1664, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Cox, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Craddock, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Dennis em 16 de junho de 1691, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu antes junho de 1712, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Cox родился около 1664 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени John Cox было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Craddock, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Dennis 16 июня 1691 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер перед июнь 1712 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Cox nació aproximadamente 1664, en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, John Cox, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Rebecca Craddock, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sarah Dennis el 16 de junio de 1691, en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió antes de junio de 1712, en su pueblo.
